reviews.review_title: Love the concept - eats up space
reviews.review_description: I'd gladly give this app 5 stars if the developers fixed this issue - It appears to want to download ALL of the experiences, eating up precious storage space. You can't access a session randomly if it hasn't been downloaded from the que. There are 75+ downloads - that's A LOT of space, time AND data.
I like the idea of this, but the graphics are very grainy.

reviews.review_title: Waste of money.       Better free apps
reviews.review_description: Waste of money,,,much better free apps on explore

NRG takes you to incredible destinations like waterfalls and beaches for amazing meditation sessions and I can't express enough how much I love it! 

The locations featured in the app are breathtakingly beautiful and incredibly immersive. As soon as I start a session, I find myself transported to these serene places. It's as if I can feel the gentle breeze, hear the soothing sounds of nature, and see the crystal-clear waters. The visuals are stunningly lifelike, and it's the perfect escape from the daily hustle and bustle.

But it's not just about the visuals; the meditation instructions are top-notch. The guidance provided is clear and calming, helping me find my center and achieve a deep sense of peace. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced meditator, the app caters to all levels.

After each session, I feel rejuvenated, calm, and centered. It's like a mental vacation that I can take anytime, anywhere. Highly Recommend to anyone looking for a unique VR wellness app!

Very cool app.  You can got to beautiful places around the world to meditate or take in the sounds of nature.  I was impressed by the quality of the videos.  Definitely recommend.  They have a variety of experiences.
